CVE-2020-12740.title: tcprewrite in Tcpreplay through 4.3.2 has a heap-based buffer ove ...
CVE-2020-12740.description: tcprewrite in Tcpreplay through 4.3.2 has a heap-based buffer over-read during a get_c operation. The issue is being triggered in the function get_ipv6_next() at common/get.c.

CVE-2020-18976.title: Buffer Overflow in Tcpreplay v4.3.2 allows attackers to cause a D ...
CVE-2020-18976.description: Buffer Overflow in Tcpreplay v4.3.2 allows attackers to cause a Denial of Service via the 'do_checksum' function in 'checksum.c'. It can be triggered by sending a crafted pcap file to the 'tcpreplay-edit' binary. This issue is different than CVE-2019-8381.

CVE-2020-23273.description: Heap-buffer overflow in the randomize_iparp function in edit_packet.c. of Tcpreplay v4.3.2 allows attackers to cause a denial of service (DOS) via a crafted pcap.
